name: dxf-viewer
description: Local DXF viewer (Electron) bundled with esbuild

scripts.dist:viewer: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --linux deb --config.extraMetadata.name=dxf-viewer --config.productName='DXF Viewer' --config.appId=local.dxf.viewer --config.linux.desktop.Name='DXF Viewer' --config.linux.desktop.StartupWMClass=dxf-viewer --config.directories.output=dist/viewer
scripts.dist:plus: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --linux deb --config.extraMetadata.name=dxf-viewer-plus --config.productName='DXF Viewer Plus' --config.appId=local.dxf.viewer.plus --config.linux.desktop.Name='DXF Viewer Plus' --config.linux.desktop.StartupWMClass=dxf-viewer-plus --config.directories.output=dist/plus
